nasb.text: He was sixteen years old when he became king, and he reigned fifty-two years in Jerusalem; and his mother’s name was Jecoliah of Jerusalem.

esv.text: He was sixteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned fifty-two years in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Jecoliah of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他登基的時候才十六歲，他在耶路撒冷作王五十二年。他母親名叫耶可利雅，是來自耶路撒冷的。

ccb.text: 他十六岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政五十二年。他母亲叫耶可利雅，是耶路撒冷人。
